name: DEFECT/DAMAGED PACKAGE-CLEARANCE: Reflex Plus Medium-Large Breed Adult Dog Food Chicken 15kg
shortDescription: Super premium dog food with chicken for adult dogs of medium & large breeds.
description: Super premium dog food with chicken for adult dogs of medium & large breeds. Content: Processed Chicken Protein, Wheat, Corn, Chicken Fat, Rice, Sugar Beet, Liver Flavor, Whey Powder, Vitamins and Minerals, Xylo-Oligosaccharides, Brewer's Yeast, L-Carnitine, Flaxseed, Salt, Yucca Schidigera, Preservatives - Antioxidants. Minerals: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Iodine, Zinc, Copper, Iron, Selenium. Vitamins: Vit. A, Vit. D3, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 - B2 - B3 (Niacin) - B6 - B12 - B7 (Biotin) - B9 (Folic Acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate. Nutrient Components Crude Protein 32% Crude Fat 22% Crude Ash 7% Crude Cellulose 2,5% Nutritional Supplements Vitamin A (3A672A) 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3 (3A671) 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E (3A700) 150 mg/kg Vitamin C (3A300) 200 mg/kg
